texto: I cannot make my kids obey. But I can control my responses to their disobedience—that is, I can respect their choices and provide wise consequences for their actions, so they can learn just as much about wisdom from disobeying as from obeying. And I can respond in ways that create an environment in which their poor choices are their problem.

texto: Parents know all about the verses related to how children should behave but not so much about those that remind them about how they should behave.

texto: Your children should not have to act appropriately so that you can feel like a valuable person. It is not their job to validate you or erase past relationship indictments against you with their performance. In a healthy Christian family children are not there for the adults, adults are there to be resources for their children.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeff VanVonderen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Your children should not have to act appropriately so that you can feel like a valuable person. I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, parenting, roles pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de roles e value.

texto: The wife's list, no matter how long or short, communicates to the husband, "I don't like you. I don't accept you. But if you perform the way I think you should, then I will like and accept you." And no matter how long the husband's list may be, it says in like manner to his wife, "I don't like you either. But if you stop caring about things so much, if you stop feeling the way you feel and noticing the things you notice, then I will accept and like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeff VanVonderen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The wife's list, no matter how long or short, communicates to the husband, "I don't like you. I d…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, marriage, tension pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e tension.
